meta.desc_tr: Dis siteye baglanmadan calisan, lokal JSON verisiyle sunulan 359 renk tonlu Pantone uyum rehberi. Kod, HEX, RGB, ton filtresi ve arama destegi icerir.
meta.desc_en: A locally hosted Pantone match guide with 359 color tones served from JSON. Includes code, HEX, RGB, tone filters and search.
meta.warning_tr: Uyari: Bu sayfa resmi Pantone katalogu degildir ve Pantone lisansli renk kutuphanesinin kopyasi olarak kullanilmamalidir. Renkler yaklasik dijital onizleme/uyum secimi icindir; kesin baski, boya ve uretim kararlarinda fiziksel kartela veya lisansli kaynak kontrol edilmelidir.
meta.warning_en: Notice: This page is not an official Pantone catalog and must not be treated as a copy of the licensed Pantone color library. Colors are approximate digital previews for matching; verify with a physical guide or licensed source before print, paint or production decisions.
meta.search_tr: Kod, renk adi, HEX veya RGB ara
meta.search_en: Search by code, color name, HEX or RGB
